title: Five Why: Pre-Commit Hook Failures on platform/main Branch
context: Committing demo provisioning routes (P4-T4/T5) to feat/demo-provisioning branch (tracking platform/main) blocked by pre-commit hook. Two hard blockers, four soft warnings.

chains.symptom: Pre-commit hook exits with code 1: 'Pattern validation failed'
whys: Why 1: Pre-commit hook calls `bash scripts/validate-patterns.sh` → file not found → EXIT_CODE=1
Why 2: The script exists on origin/main (luhtech/ectropy) but not on platform/main (ectropy-ai/platform) — only 2 commits were cherry-picked to platform/main
Why 3: When ectropy-ai/platform was created as a public release, the infrastructure validation scripts were not included in the initial commit
Why 4: The .husky/pre-commit hook was authored for origin/main's full repo structure with all 200+ scripts, but runs unchanged against platform/main's reduced tree
Why 5 (ROOT): The pre-commit hook unconditionally assumes all dependency scripts exist. No existence guard before execution.
chains.root_cause: Pre-commit hook hard-fails on missing optional scripts instead of gracefully degrading
chains.fix: Guard scripts/validate-patterns.sh with `[ -f scripts/validate-patterns.sh ]` existence check. Skip with warning if missing.

chains.symptom: TypeScript error TS2339: Property 'env' does not exist on type 'ImportMeta' in web-dashboard
whys: Why 1: apps/web-dashboard/src/hooks/usePlaybackWebSocket.ts:166 uses `import.meta.env.VITE_API_HOST` — TypeScript doesn't recognize `.env` on `ImportMeta`
Why 2: Vite augments `ImportMeta` with `.env` via its `vite/client` type declarations, but these are not loaded
Why 3: No `vite-env.d.ts` file exists in the web-dashboard project. Vite's create-vite scaffolder generates this by default, but it was never added.

Why 4: The tsconfig.app.json has `types: ['node', 'react', 'react-dom']` — an explicit list that excludes `vite/client`. Without a `/// <reference types='vite/client' />` directive, the augmentation is invisible.

Why 5 (ROOT): When commit b38e9384 (2026-01-23) added `import.meta.env.VITE_API_HOST` to usePlaybackWebSocket.ts, the corresponding Vite type declaration file was omitted. The error was latent — masked by nx cache or `--skip-nx-cache` not being used in prior CI runs.
chains.root_cause: Missing vite-env.d.ts type declaration file. Vite projects require `/// <reference types='vite/client' />` to make import.meta.env available to TypeScript.
chains.fix: Create apps/web-dashboard/src/vite-env.d.ts with `/// <reference types='vite/client' />`. Add .gitignore negation `!apps/web-dashboard/src/vite-env.d.ts` to override the `apps/*/src/**/*.d.ts` ignore pattern.
chains.verification: npx nx run web-dashboard:type-check --skip-nx-cache → Successfully ran

chains.symptom: ReferenceError: describe is not defined in 3 placeholder test files
whys: Why 1: Test files use bare `describe()`, `it()`, `expect()` without importing from vitest
Why 2: Vitest defaults to `globals: false` — test globals are NOT injected into the scope unless explicitly configured
Why 3: libs/ifc-processing and libs/database have no vitest.config.ts. libs/auth has one with `globals: true` but its include pattern is `.ts` only — the `.js` file is excluded
Why 4: These are placeholder stub files from initial project scaffolding. They test nothing (e.g., `expect(1).toBe(1)`) and were never updated for vitest migration

Why 5 (ROOT): Legacy Jest-style test stubs were left in place during the Jest-to-vitest migration (commit 8e308f3d). They assume Jest's global `describe/it/expect` injection which vitest does not provide by default.
chains.root_cause: Legacy placeholder test files from Jest era were not cleaned up during vitest migration
chains.fix: Delete libs/auth/src/auth.spec.js and libs/database/src/database.spec.js (real tests exist in those projects). Add vitest import to libs/ifc-processing/src/ifc-processing.spec.ts (only test file in that project).

chains.symptom: Failed to load url @ectropy/shared/types/express in auth test suite
whys: Why 1: Vitest cannot resolve @ectropy/shared/types/express and @ectropy/shared/utils at test runtime
Why 2: The path aliases in libs/auth/vitest.config.ts use relative paths (../shared/...) that assume a specific directory structure
Why 3: rbac.middleware.spec.ts is explicitly excluded in the vitest config with comment 'Exclude old Jest-based tests' but vitest still processes its imports when scanning
Why 4: The auth lib's vitest setup mocks @ectropy/shared/utils but the mock setup runs after module resolution fails

Why 5 (ROOT): Cross-library workspace path resolution in vitest requires either project references, workspace configuration, or correctly resolved aliases. The auth lib's vitest config has aliases that don't resolve correctly for all import paths.
chains.root_cause: Vitest path alias configuration in libs/auth doesn't fully resolve workspace cross-references
chains.fix_status: NOT FIXED in this commit — requires vitest workspace configuration refactor. Non-blocking (test step uses || true).
chains.impact: 45 tests in jwt.service.test.ts still pass. Only legacy/broken test files affected.

chains.symptom: 19/26 database integration tests fail: PLATFORM_DATABASE_URL not set
whys: Why 1: database-manager.integration.test.ts requires a running PostgreSQL instance
Why 2: PLATFORM_DATABASE_URL environment variable is not set in the local development environment
Why 3: These are integration tests designed for CI with database access, not local pre-commit
Why 4: The vitest config does not separate unit tests from integration tests
Why 5 (ROOT): Integration tests requiring external services are co-located with unit tests and run indiscriminately during pre-commit
chains.root_cause: No separation between unit tests (no external deps) and integration tests (need DB)
chains.fix_status: NOT FIXED in this commit — requires test categorization. Non-blocking. 7/26 unit tests pass locally.
chains.impact: 7 passing tests (connection-manager + tenant-context), 19 failing integration tests

chain_1.change: Wrapped scripts/validate-patterns.sh call in `[ -f ... ]` existence guard

chain_2.change: Created vite-env.d.ts with /// <reference types='vite/client' />. Added .gitignore negation for vite-env.d.ts to override apps/*/src/**/*.d.ts pattern.

chain_3.change: Deleted 2 empty placeholder stubs (real tests exist). Added vitest import to ifc-processing (only test file).

not_fixed.chain_4: Auth vitest path aliases — requires workspace refactor, non-blocking
not_fixed.chain_5: DB integration tests — require running PostgreSQL, non-blocking

commit: pending — staged 9 files on feat/demo-provisioning branch
